evals.name: promote-archive-keep
evals.prompt: process inbox — promote test-inbox-1-w to research with topic 'test-topic-1', archive test-inbox-2-w, keep test-inbox-3-w
evals.expected_output: test-inbox-1-w → research/2026-05-test-topic-1-research/; test-inbox-2-w → 4-Archive/inbox-YYYY-MM-DD/; test-inbox-3-w stays in 0-Inbox/.

evals.name: project-and-archive
evals.prompt: Friday inbox review — make test-inbox-4-w into a project called 'test-inbox-project-w' (execution type), archive test-inbox-5-w

assertions.text: Project folder 1-Projects/2026-05-test-inbox-project-w/ exists with CLAUDE.md and memory.md

evals.name: delete-and-promote
evals.prompt: clear my inbox — delete test-inbox-6-w (yes confirm), promote test-inbox-7-w to reference as 'test-inbox-7-w.md'

assertions.text: test-inbox-6-w.md is NOT in 4-Archive (would be wrong — it was supposed to be deleted)
